creator: cedric@precidata.com
text:
The "Upcoming Release Schedule" of the website says:

>  As of 2021-05-17, the next release has not yet been announced.

Since 12.2 was released 10 month ago, I expect some kind of new stable release soon

It would be helpful to have some visibility....

Thanks

PS: The "Preview" tab of the bug database show nothing for that comment, I hope I get it right...
